channel.title: How to install third part library/dependencies
channel.description:
I am having trouble installing react spring or any dependencies to make the project really interesting. I have decided to make everything with bootstrap but now i need to use horizontal scroling in a gallery and so i need to install a dependency/library to make the work easier.
========
Here down in a default Mars-theme i've installed react-spring:
npm i react-spring.
And then, npm frontity dev trying to start de application and so this:
![imagen|690x387](upload://aKjBZdAlEnE8DPCscofkIbtkdzj.png)
Console message here down below
``` Nicolas@DESKTOP-0P2F3IG MINGW64 /c/_ DISCO D/CODIGO/_ 2022 codigo/Frontity/npm (master) $ npx frontity dev (node:7028) Warning: Closing file descriptor 3 on garbage collection (Use `node --trace-warnings ...` to show where the warning was created) (node:7028) [DEP0137] DeprecationWarning: Closing a FileHandle object on garbage collection is deprecated. Please close FileHandle objects explicitly using FileHandle.prototype.close(). In the future, an error will be thrown if a file descriptor is closed during garbage collection.
SERVER STARTED -- Listening @ http://localhost:3000 - mode: development - target: module - public-path: /static/
Error: ./node_modules/@frontity/react-easy-state/dist/react-platform.js Module not found: Error: Can't resolve 'react-dom' in 'C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity
pm
ode_modules\@frontityeact-easy-state\dist' resolve 'react-dom' in 'C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity
pm
ode_modules\@frontityeact-easy-state\dist' Parsed request is a module using description file: C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity
pm
ode_modules\@frontityeact-easy-state\package.json (relative path: ./dist) Field 'browser' doesn't contain a valid alias configuration resolve as module C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity
pm
ode_modules\@frontityeact-easy-state\dist
ode_modules doesn't exist or is not a directory C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity
pm
ode_modules\@frontityeact-easy-state
ode_modules doesn't exist or is not a directory C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity
pm
ode_modules\@frontity
ode_modules doesn't exist or is not a directory C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity
pm
ode_modules
ode_modules doesn't exist or is not a directory C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity
ode_modules doesn't exist or is not a directory C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo
ode_modules doesn't exist or is not a directory C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO
ode_modules doesn't exist or is not a directory C:\_ DISCO D
ode_modules doesn't exist or is not a directory C:
ode_modules doesn't exist or is not a directory looking for modules in C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity
pm
ode_modules using description file: C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity
pm\package.json (relative path: ./node_modules) Field 'browser' doesn't contain a valid alias configuration using description file: C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity
pm\package.json (relative path: ./node_modules/react-dom) no extension Field 'browser' doesn't contain a valid alias configuration C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity
pm
ode_moduleseact-dom doesn't exist .js Field 'browser' doesn't contain a valid alias configuration C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity
pm
ode_moduleseact-dom.js doesn't exist .jsx Field 'browser' doesn't contain a valid alias configuration C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity
pm
ode_moduleseact-dom.jsx doesn't exist .ts Field 'browser' doesn't contain a valid alias configuration C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity
pm
ode_moduleseact-dom.ts doesn't exist .tsx Field 'browser' doesn't contain a valid alias configuration C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity
pm
ode_moduleseact-dom.tsx doesn't exist as directory C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity
pm
ode_moduleseact-dom doesn't exist [C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity
pm
ode_modules\@frontityeact-easy-state\dist
ode_modules] [C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity
pm
ode_modules\@frontityeact-easy-state
ode_modules] [C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity
pm
ode_modules\@frontity
ode_modules] [C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity
pm
ode_modules
ode_modules] [C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity
ode_modules] [C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo
ode_modules] [C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO
ode_modules] [C:\_ DISCO D
ode_modules] [C:
ode_modules] [C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity
pm
ode_moduleseact-dom] [C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity
pm
ode_moduleseact-dom.js] [C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity
pm
ode_moduleseact-dom.jsx] [C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity
pm
ode_moduleseact-dom.ts] [C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity
pm
ode_moduleseact-dom.tsx] @ ./node_modules/@frontity/react-easy-state/dist/react-platform.js 1:0-23 1:0-23 @ ./node_modules/@frontity/react-easy-state/dist/bundle.js @ ./node_modules/@frontity/connect/src/index.js @ ./node_modules/@frontity/core/src/client/index.tsx @ ./build/bundling/entry-points/npopm/client.ts @ multi webpack-hot-middleware/client ./build/bundling/entry-points/npopm/client.ts
If you need help please visit https://community.frontity.org/.
```
It seems that I can't use dependencies in frontity
Thank you,

item.title: How to install third part library/dependencies
item.dc:creator: nicobava96
item.description:
Hi Orballo, can you help me with this?

I have to get more than 100 posts from wordpress, how can I do that?

I’ve read that I have to configure another entry point.

I could solve the scroll horizontal thing.

Here you can see the page I’m working on:
https://nicolasbava-memoriafp-default.layer0-limelight.link/

Thank you

Read full topic
item.source: How to install third part library/dependencies

item.title: How to install third part library/dependencies
item.dc:creator: orballo
item.description:
@nicobava96 I think the issue is that the react-scroll-horizontal uses React 16, while Frontity uses React 17. That’s causing the conflict between dependencies, therefore the error. I’d suggest you find another more up to date library.

Read full topic
item.source: How to install third part library/dependencies

item.title: How to install third part library/dependencies
item.dc:creator: nicobava96
item.description:
Well, It didn’t work for me.

I will put the repository down below. It’s a default Mars Theme and a dependency called “React Horizontal Scroll” (npm i react-scroll-horizontal).

I did this:

  1. Installed the dependency in the root folder.
  2. paste ’ “react-scroll-horizontal”: “^1.6.6” ’ in the mars theme package.json
  3. run “npm i” in the root folder
  4. npx frontity dev and this is what I’ve got:

I have seen this error before, hope you can help me. I will put this project in a repository if you need it, buy anyway it’s a mars theme default with that dependency.

Here is the project:

GitHub

GitHub - nicolasbava/frontity-dependency-trial

Contribute to nicolasbava/frontity-dependency-trial development by creating an account on GitHub.

Read full topic
item.source: How to install third part library/dependencies

item.title: How to install third part library/dependencies
item.dc:creator: orballo
item.description:
Hi @nicobava96 !

To install dependencies on your package, you need to add them manually to the package.json file and then run npm i from the project root folder.

You should not run npm i inside a package, because it can create conflicts between dependencies, and the way Frontity works, all packages dependencies are installed together in the node_modules of the project’s root folder.

Read full topic
item.source: How to install third part library/dependencies

item.title: How to install third part library/dependencies
item.dc:creator: nicobava96
item.description:
I am having trouble installing react spring or any dependencies to make the project really interesting. I have decided to make everything with bootstrap but now i need to use horizontal scroling in a gallery and so i need to install a dependency/library to make the work easier.

========

Here down in a default Mars-theme i’ve installed react-spring:

npm i react-spring.

And then, npm frontity dev trying to start de application and so this:

Console message here down below

Nicolas@DESKTOP-0P2F3IG MINGW64 /c/_ DISCO D/CODIGO/_ 2022 codigo/Frontity/npm (master)
$ npx frontity dev
(node:7028) Warning: Closing file descriptor 3 on garbage collection
(Use `node --trace-warnings ...` to show where the warning was created)
(node:7028) [DEP0137] DeprecationWarning: Closing a FileHandle object on garbage collection is deprecated. Please close FileHandle objects explicitly using FileHandle.prototype.close(). In the future, an error will be thrown if a file descriptor is closed during garbage collection.


SERVER STARTED -- Listening @ http://localhost:3000
  - mode: development
  - target: module
  - public-path: /static/



Error: ./node_modules/@frontity/react-easy-state/dist/react-platform.js
Module not found: Error: Can't resolve 'react-dom' in 'C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity\npm\node_modules\@frontity\react-easy-state\dist'
resolve 'react-dom' in 'C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity\npm\node_modules\@frontity\react-easy-state\dist'
  Parsed request is a module
  using description file: C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity\npm\node_modules\@frontity\react-easy-state\package.json (relative path: ./dist)
    Field 'browser' doesn't contain a valid alias configuration
    resolve as module
      C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity\npm\node_modules\@frontity\react-easy-state\dist\node_modules doesn't exist or is not a directory
      C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity\npm\node_modules\@frontity\react-easy-state\node_modules doesn't exist or is not a directory
      C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity\npm\node_modules\@frontity\node_modules doesn't exist or is not a directory
      C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity\npm\node_modules\node_modules doesn't exist or is not a directory
      C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity\node_modules doesn't exist or is not a directory
      C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\node_modules doesn't exist or is not a directory
      C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\node_modules doesn't exist or is not a directory
      C:\_ DISCO D\node_modules doesn't exist or is not a directory
      C:\node_modules doesn't exist or is not a directory
      looking for modules in C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity\npm\node_modules
        using description file: C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity\npm\package.json (relative path: ./node_modules)
          Field 'browser' doesn't contain a valid alias configuration
          using description file: C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity\npm\package.json (relative path: ./node_modules/react-dom)
            no extension
              Field 'browser' doesn't contain a valid alias configuration
              C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity\npm\node_modules\react-dom doesn't exist
            .js
              Field 'browser' doesn't contain a valid alias configuration
              C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity\npm\node_modules\react-dom.js doesn't exist
            .jsx
              Field 'browser' doesn't contain a valid alias configuration
              C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity\npm\node_modules\react-dom.jsx doesn't exist
            .ts
              Field 'browser' doesn't contain a valid alias configuration
              C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity\npm\node_modules\react-dom.ts doesn't exist
            .tsx
              Field 'browser' doesn't contain a valid alias configuration
              C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity\npm\node_modules\react-dom.tsx doesn't exist
            as directory
              C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity\npm\node_modules\react-dom doesn't exist
[C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity\npm\node_modules\@frontity\react-easy-state\dist\node_modules]
[C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity\npm\node_modules\@frontity\react-easy-state\node_modules]
[C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity\npm\node_modules\@frontity\node_modules]
[C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity\npm\node_modules\node_modules]
[C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity\node_modules]
[C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\node_modules]
[C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\node_modules]
[C:\_ DISCO D\node_modules]
[C:\node_modules]
[C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity\npm\node_modules\react-dom]
[C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity\npm\node_modules\react-dom.js]
[C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity\npm\node_modules\react-dom.jsx]
[C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity\npm\node_modules\react-dom.ts]
[C:\_ DISCO D\CODIGO\_ 2022 codigo\Frontity\npm\node_modules\react-dom.tsx]
 @ ./node_modules/@frontity/react-easy-state/dist/react-platform.js 1:0-23 1:0-23
 @ ./node_modules/@frontity/react-easy-state/dist/bundle.js
 @ ./node_modules/@frontity/connect/src/index.js
 @ ./node_modules/@frontity/core/src/client/index.tsx
 @ ./build/bundling/entry-points/npopm/client.ts
 @ multi webpack-hot-middleware/client ./build/bundling/entry-points/npopm/client.ts

If you need help please visit https://community.frontity.org/.

It seems that I can’t use dependencies in frontity

Thank you,

Read full topic
item.source: How to install third part library/dependencies
